subcodes.first_line: He who is the Countenance hath indeed appeared before Me, bearing a ring engraved with Thy name, whereupon the Tongue, ordained by God as the Dayspring, spoke in thy remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی الوجه خاتم فیه نقش اسمک لذا نطق علی ذکرک لسان الذی جعله الله مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action
